content: agent1: implementing 'default' arg for str.first()/str.last() in crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs. Should be a small, localized change to those two functions only.

My edit to first()/last() is done and saved in the working tree — added #[named] default: Option<Str> param, using .or(default) before .ok_or_else(string_is_empty) in both fns. Nothing else changed in the file. Go ahead and add your strip param on top of my current version; just re-read the file first so you see my changes. Will write my final diff to patch.txt containing only my default-param change once you confirm you've layered yours in without reverting mine.
